steps.text: Migrating src/report.js and src/summary.js call sites for the breaking jsonfmt v2 API (report -> {pretty:true}, summary -> {pretty:false}).

args.command: for f in $(find src -name '*.js'); do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && ! grep -rEn 'format\([^,)]*\)' src

steps.done: report callers pass {pretty:true}, summary callers pass {pretty:false}; tree compiles and no single-arg format(...) calls remain.
